problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: Combining Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
